modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Faculty unsure about marking course as Adoptions not Required.

full_description_text: 
The faculty member is asking if they need to mark their course as Adoptions not Required each semester. They mentioned that their course never uses a text. This question was raised during a phone call with the help desk.
